[30;1m1572 | [0m[35m        //   captures = result.slice(1).map(maybeToString)[0m
[30;1m1573 | [0m[35m        // but for some reason `nativeSlice.call(result, 1, result.length)` (called in[0m
[30;1m1574 | [0m[35m        // the slice polyfill when slicing native arrays) "doesn't work" in safari 9 and[0m
[30;1m1575 | [0m[35m        // causes a crash (https://pastebin.com/N21QzeQA) when trying to debug it.[0m
[30;1m1576 | [0m[35m        for (var j = 1; j < result.length; j++) captures.push(maybeToString(result[j]));[0m

[30;1m4222 | [0m[35m  var task = { fn: fn, next: undefined };[0m
[30;1m4223 | [0m[35m  if (last) last.next = task;[0m
[30;1m4224 | [0m[35m  if (!head) {[0m
[30;1m4225 | [0m[35m    head = task;[0m
[30;1m4226 | [0m[35m    notify();[0m
[30;1m4227 | [0m[35m  } last = task;[0m
[30;1m4228 | [0m[35m};[0m

[31m--[ [0m[34mMatch #[0m[33m91[0m[34m of [0m[33m244[0m[31m ]--[0m
   Rule Id: [34mBD000610[0m
       Tag: [34mSecurity.Backdoor.LOLBAS.Linux[0m

  Filename: [33m/vue-open-weather-widget-1.tar/package/dist/vue-open-weather-widget.umd.js.map[0m
   Pattern: [32m\.(request|post|get)\([0m

   Rule Id: [34mBD000610[0m
       Tag: [34mSecurity.Backdoor.LOLBAS.Linux[0m
